User.title: User
User.description: User profile with status, role, and coordinates

uid.description: The Google UID of the user

name.description: The full name of the user

email.description: The email address of the user

initials.description: The 2-character initials generated from their name

isActive.description: Whether the user profile has been activated by an admin

role.description: The role of the user (admin or user)

lat.description: Latitude of the user's current coordinate pinpoint

lng.description: Longitude of the user's current coordinate pinpoint

updatedAt.description: The timestamp of the last update

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles containing status, role, and map coordinates
